title: Rename device - dialog
scenario: Rename device dialog layout and buttons do not match Figma design in Device Settings > General
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap on the connected device name to enter Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, tap on General.
5. Locate the device's official name displayed on the General screen.
6. Tap on the device's official name.
expected: A dialog appears containing: a text field pre-filled with the current device name, a Cancel button, a Done button, and the keyboard is shown below the dialog. The dialog layout and styling match the Figma design specifications.
